name: Missed work deadline to report injury - still get benefits in Idaho?
description: Maybe with good cause; notify immediately.[9]

mainEntity.name: Missed work deadline to report injury - still get benefits in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe with good cause; notify immediately.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possible with good cause like hospitalization, but notify ASAP.[9] Strict rules. Key factors: (1) Prompt knowledge to employer; (2) Prejudice to insurer; (3) Excusable delay; (4) One-year filing. Document reason, file now. Legal help for waivers.
